# vaccine

Statistical tools for immune correlates analysis of vaccine clinical
trial data

## Overview

**vaccine** is an open-source R package containing various
semiparametric and nonparametric statistical tools for immune correlates
analysis of vaccine clinical trial data. This includes calculation of
summary statistics and estimation of risk, vaccine efficacy, controlled
risk, and controlled vaccine efficacy.

## Installation

The latest stable version of **vaccine** can be installed from CRAN
using
[`install.packages()`](https://rdrr.io/r/utils/install.packages.html):

``` r

install.packages("vaccine")
```

The current development version can be installed using
`devtools::install_github()`:

``` r

devtools::install_github(repo="Avi-Kenny/vaccine")
```

## Documentation

The full package documentation can be found at
<https://avi-kenny.github.io/vaccine/>.

## Bugs reports and feature requests

To submit a bug report or request a new feature, please submit a new
[GitHub Issue](https://github.com/Avi-Kenny/vaccine/issues).

# Package index

## All functions

- [`as_table()`](https://avi-kenny.github.io/vaccine/reference/as_table.md)
  : Create table of estimates
- [`diagnostics()`](https://avi-kenny.github.io/vaccine/reference/diagnostics.md)
  : Run diagnostics
- [`est_ce()`](https://avi-kenny.github.io/vaccine/reference/est_ce.md)
  : Estimate controlled effect curves
- [`est_med()`](https://avi-kenny.github.io/vaccine/reference/est_med.md)
  : Estimate mediation effects
- [`est_overall()`](https://avi-kenny.github.io/vaccine/reference/est_overall.md)
  : Estimate overall risk and vaccine efficacy
- [`hvtn505`](https://avi-kenny.github.io/vaccine/reference/hvtn505.md)
  : HVTN 505 Dataset
- [`load_data()`](https://avi-kenny.github.io/vaccine/reference/load_data.md)
  : Load and format data object
- [`params_ce_cox()`](https://avi-kenny.github.io/vaccine/reference/params_ce_cox.md)
  : Set parameters controlling Cox model estimation of controlled effect
  curves
- [`params_ce_np()`](https://avi-kenny.github.io/vaccine/reference/params_ce_np.md)
  : Set parameters controlling nonparametric estimation of controlled
  effect curves
- [`params_med_cox()`](https://avi-kenny.github.io/vaccine/reference/params_med_cox.md)
  : Set parameters controlling Cox model estimation of mediation effects
- [`params_med_np()`](https://avi-kenny.github.io/vaccine/reference/params_med_np.md)
  : Set parameters controlling nonparametric estimation of mediation
  effects
- [`plot_ce()`](https://avi-kenny.github.io/vaccine/reference/plot_ce.md)
  : Plotting controlled effect curves
- [`summary_stats()`](https://avi-kenny.github.io/vaccine/reference/summary_stats.md)
  : Calculate summary statistics
- [`trim()`](https://avi-kenny.github.io/vaccine/reference/trim.md) :
  Trim data for plotting/reporting
